introSection: Spin Runway (Japanese: スピンランウェイ) is a steel spinning enclosed roller coaster at Yomiuriland in Japan. It opened on 18 March 2016 and was manufactured by Gerstlauer.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Spin Runway is an enclosed roller coaster. It is themed around a giant clothing factory.

fullText:
Spin Runway (Japanese: スピンランウェイ) is a steel spinning enclosed roller coaster at Yomiuriland in Japan. It opened on 18 March 2016 and was manufactured by Gerstlauer.

Spin Runway is an enclosed roller coaster. It is themed around a giant clothing factory.
